# Tikeo docs snapshot

Generated from docs/docs and zh-CN docs. This curated snapshot lists source-backed public documentation entrypoints that are safe for LLM and search ingestion. The canonical pages remain the markdown sources in docs/docs and docs/i18n/zh-CN/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/current. README is intentionally brief; the docs site owns install, configure, SDK integration, deployment, troubleshooting, and acceptance evidence.

## Operator-grade entry path

- Overview: /docs/ gives the Documentation map, Reader outcome, Architecture boundary, and Evidence-first evaluation contract.
- Installation: /docs/getting-started/installation covers the Toolchain matrix, Version baselines, Repository surfaces, First-time bootstrap, and Verification commands needed before local evaluation.
- Quickstart: /docs/getting-started/quickstart walks Phase 0 through Server, Web, Bootstrap the first Owner, Create an app-scoped SDK API key, start an outbound Worker with TIKEO_WORKER_CONNECT=1, trigger through the Management API, and capture Acceptance evidence.
- Configuration: /docs/reference/configuration contains the Complete default-value table from crates/tikeo-config/src/lib.rs, including storage.timestamp_offset, cluster.transport_token, transport_security.worker_tunnel.client_ca_path, observability.tracing.otlp_endpoint, TIKEO__AUTH__OIDC__ISSUER_URL, and Worker SDK defaults.

## SDK pages

- Rust Worker SDK: /docs/sdks/rust documents Dependency coordinates, WorkerConfig defaults from sdks/rust/tikeo/src/config.rs, Minimal Worker, ManagementClient::new, ManagementCreateJobRequest::api, ManagementTriggerJobRequest::api, ManagementTriggerJobRequest::broadcast_api, ManagementBroadcastSelectorRequest, x-tikeo-api-key, TIKEO_MANAGEMENT_API_KEY, triggerType=api, executionMode=single, broadcastSelector, and Live verification runbook.
- Go Worker SDK: /docs/sdks/go documents Dependency coordinates, WorkerConfig defaults from sdks/go/tikeo/config.go, Minimal Worker, NewManagementClient, APIJob, APITrigger, BroadcastAPITrigger, BroadcastSelectorRequest, and Live verification runbook.
- Java SDK and Spring Boot Starter: /docs/sdks/java-spring-boot documents Dependency coordinates, single-artifact dependency selection from sdks/java/settings.gradle.kts, Spring Boot property defaults, @TikeoProcessor, HttpTikeoJobClient, CreateJobRequest.api, TriggerJobRequest.api, TriggerJobRequest.broadcastApi, BroadcastSelectorRequest, and Live verification runbook.
- Python Worker SDK: /docs/sdks/python documents Dependency coordinates from sdks/python/tikeo/pyproject.toml, WorkerConfig defaults, Minimal Worker, ManagementClient, api_job, api_trigger, broadcast_api_trigger, BroadcastSelectorRequest, and Live verification runbook.
- Node.js Worker SDK: /docs/sdks/nodejs documents Dependency coordinates from sdks/nodejs/tikeo/src/config.ts and package metadata, WorkerConfig defaults, Minimal Worker, ManagementClient, apiJob, apiTrigger, broadcastApiTrigger, BroadcastSelectorRequest, and Live verification runbook.

## Reference pages

- Management OpenAPI reference: /docs/reference/management-openapi documents /api-docs/openapi.json, /api/v1/jobs, /api/v1/jobs/{job}:trigger, /api/v1/instances/{instance}, /api/v1/instances/{instance}/logs, CreateJobRequest, TriggerJobRequest, ApiResponse, and x-tikeo-api-key.
- Worker Tunnel protobuf reference: /docs/reference/worker-tunnel-protobuf documents WorkerTunnelService, OpenTunnel, SubscribeTaskLogs, RegisterWorker, Heartbeat, WorkerRegistered, DispatchTask, TaskLog, TaskResult, TaskCheckpoint, assignment_token, and processor_name.

## User guides

- Dashboard user guide: /docs/user-guide/dashboard explains web/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx, /api/v1/metrics/summary, /api/v1/cluster, instance streams, and Worker streams.
- Jobs user guide: /docs/user-guide/jobs explains web/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx, /api/v1/jobs, /api/v1/jobs/{job}:trigger, triggerType=api, executionMode=single, broadcastSelector, versions, rollback, and scheduling advice.
- Instances user guide: /docs/user-guide/instances explains web/src/pages/InstancesPage.tsx, /api/v1/instances/{instance}, /api/v1/instances/{instance}/logs, attempts, cancellation, and broadcast result nodes.
- Workers user guide: /docs/user-guide/workers explains web/src/pages/WorkersPage.tsx, Worker Tunnel, DispatchTask, structured capabilities, Worker lifecycle history, and outbound-only Worker registration.
- Workflows user guide: /docs/user-guide/workflows explains web/src/pages/WorkflowsPage.tsx, /api/v1/workflows, DAG definitions, validation, dry-run, run, replay, shards, and recovery.
- Scripts user guide: /docs/user-guide/scripts explains web/src/pages/ScriptsPage.tsx, /api/v1/scripts, version history, publish, rollback, and diff governance.
- Audit user guide: /docs/user-guide/audit explains web/src/pages/AuditLogsPage.tsx, /api/v1/audit-logs, /api/v1/audit-logs:export, filters, before/after snapshots, and trace evidence.
- Settings guide: /docs/user-guide/settings explains web/src/routes.tsx, API-Key management, RBAC, tenant scopes, users, roles, calendars, and GitOps/IaC route boundaries.

## 中文关键页面

- 中文概览: /zh-CN/docs/ 包含文档地图、阅读结果、架构边界、证据优先验收。
- 中文安装: /zh-CN/docs/getting-started/installation 包含工具链矩阵、版本基线、仓库工程面、首次初始化 Owner。
- 中文快速开始: /zh-CN/docs/getting-started/quickstart 包含阶段 0、创建首个 Owner、创建应用级 SDK API Key、TIKEO_WORKER_CONNECT=1、验收证据。
- 中文配置: /zh-CN/docs/reference/configuration 包含完整默认值表、storage.timestamp_offset、cluster.transport_token、Worker SDK 默认值。
- 中文 SDK: /zh-CN/docs/sdks/rust、/go、/java-spring-boot、/python、/nodejs 分别覆盖依赖坐标、WorkerConfig 默认值或 Spring Boot 属性默认值、最小 Worker、管理客户端凭证、现场验收 runbook。
- 作业用户指南: /zh-CN/docs/user-guide/jobs 说明 Jobs 页面、API 触发、广播选择器、版本历史和调度建议。
- Worker 用户指南: /zh-CN/docs/user-guide/workers 说明 Worker Tunnel、DispatchTask、structured capabilities、生命周期历史和出站连接边界。
- 审计用户指南: /zh-CN/docs/user-guide/audit 说明 /api/v1/audit-logs 与 /api/v1/audit-logs:export 的治理证据流。

## Deployment pages

- /docs/deployment/single-binary covers single binary and systemd.
- /docs/deployment/docker-compose covers SQLite, PostgreSQL, and MySQL Compose examples.
- /docs/deployment/kubernetes covers Helm, TLS/mTLS, and Worker outbound-only boundaries.
- /docs/deployment/kubernetes-controller-runbook covers Nginx Ingress, Envoy Gateway, Traefik, Gateway API, server.workerTunnelService.annotations, server.tls.workerTunnel.mtlsRequired, GRPCRoute, grpc-worker-tunnel, workers-connect-outbound-only, and controller-specific smoke checks.
- /docs/deployment/management-trigger-smoke-runbook covers scripts/management-trigger-e2e-smoke.sh, TIKEO_MANAGEMENT_TRIGGER_REBUILD_SERVER=0 scripts/management-trigger-e2e-smoke.sh, TIKEO_MANAGEMENT_TRIGGER_REPORT_DIR, TIKEO_MANAGEMENT_TRIGGER_RUN_ID, management-sdk-create-trigger, management-instance-result, x-tikeo-api-key, TIKEO_WORKER_CONNECT=1, and nodejs demo echo processed evidence.
- /docs/deployment/sse-realtime covers proxy, load balancer, WAF, and Ingress requirements for SSE.
